log.action: Initiated project for Synthesis hackathon. Assigned roles: Bagel (contracts), Claude Code (backend/MCP/docs).
Built policy engine with 12 unit tests, approval store, REST API (8 endpoints), CLI (9 commands), audit logger, skill.md.
Wrote and deployed AgentTreasury.sol + MockWstETH.sol to Base Sepolia.
Wired executor (viem integration layer) to deployed contracts. Connected API to on-chain state.
Built Lido MCP server — 11 tools covering treasury, staking, and governance. Estimated 8 hours, completed in 10 minutes.
Killed web UI in favor of agent-native interfaces (CLI + skill.md + MCP). Decision: judges are AI agents, build for agents.
Bounty research — analyzed all 46 tracks, identified 4 realistic targets. Added governance tool for Lido MCP requirement.
Funded Base mainnet deployment. Sent ETH to Base for real wstETH treasury. Identified as innovation differentiator.
Dual-chain support, mainnet placeholders, pitches, submission copy, judge demo script, story narrative, full self-audit (20 issues found, critical ones fixed).
Registered ERC-8004 agent identity on Base mainnet via Devfolio API.
Dry-ran judge demo end-to-end. All 5 policy paths verified: approved, approval_required, human approve, denied, audit trail.
